title: Pentest Manager — Report Generation & Retest Verification Loop
description: pentest_manager.py covers the full engagement lifecycle (scope, findings, CVSS, PoC, remediation workflow) across OWASP/PTES/OSSTMM/NIST methodologies. test_cloud_security_findings_engine.py and test_anti_phishing_engine.py cluster here. Gap: the report_generation method returns a dict skeleton rather than a rendered document, and the retest workflow has no automated trigger — a fixed finding requires manual retest scheduling.
missing: PDF/HTML report renderer: implement a Jinja2 template that fills in the report dict skeleton and returns a rendered PDF via weasyprint or HTML string

Auto-retest trigger: when a finding's fix_status transitions to 'fixed', auto-schedule a retest scan via the dast_scanner or real_scanner with the original PoC payload replayed against the patched endpoint
YoY recurring-finding detection: query historical engagements and flag findings that share the same CWE+endpoint pattern across 2+ engagements
